$comment: Server-controlled allowlist of bootable Tyde web client versions. This is the AUTHORITY: the loader only boots a version present in `versions` that is not blocked / below minSupported, and it SRI-verifies every artifact listed (entry `integrity` PLUS every path in `artifacts`) before the bundle runs. Phase 6's generator MUST hash every executable artifact of a version — the entry .js, the .wasm, and any code-split chunks — not just the entry. Values below are illustrative placeholders.
